title: Thoughts and Things 2/24/2024
html:
Saturday morning, corvallis coffee shop near downing gym. Drifting and slightly depressive after a night at Harrisons. Core tension: sam solum doesn't seem into him, but kyle and kristin keep pushing him to advance things — and Yahir reads kyle as actually liking sam solum himself, which feels like a quiet broken bro-code. Pivots into the potential cap meditation: God-given upper limits are real but breakable through unconditional belief.

TL;DR

  • sam solum arc deepens — Yahir's intuition reads disinterest, friend group pushes opposite, reading kyle as a covert competitor.
  • jo sighting at the same night — she "still thinks about" him, awkward exit interaction.
  • "Local-friend legend" archetype — Yahir wants to be the guy sherwood oregon friends invoke as the one who came out on top.
  • potential cap frame introduced: God-assigned upper limits are an equation, but the universe rarely enforces them — refusing to believe the cap is the move.
  • Connects directly to the you vs you manifesto — same belief-in-self ethic, applied to the question of destiny.

sam solum · kyle · kristin · jo · corvallis · sherwood oregon · potential cap · you vs you · downing gym
